mapper.select: SELECT ID, ORDER_ID, EQUIP_ID, LAST_CHANGE_INFO, REMARK, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE_HISTORY WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT e.ID as equipId, e.EQUIP_CODE as equipCode, e.EQUIP_NAME as equipName, e.MODEL_NUMBER as modelNumber, ebc.TYPE_NAME as equipBigCategoryName, emc.TYPE_NAME as equipMiddleCategoryName, esc.TYPE_NAME as equipSmallCategoryName, (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = u.PARENT_ID) as useCompanyId, (SELECT DEPT_NAME FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = u.PARENT_ID) as useCompanyName, -- d.ORG_NAME as useCompanyName, u.ID as useOrgId, u.DEPT_NAME as useOrgName, e.EQUIP_STATE as equipState, e.EQUIP_STATE_NAME as equipStateName, efi.EQUIP_ASSETS_CODE as equipAssetsCode, efi.DEPRECIATION_LIMIT as depreciationLimit, efi.ALREADY_LIMIT as alreadyLimit, efi.NET_VALUE as netValue, efi.PRICE as price, esi.EQUIP_BUY_DATE as equipBuyDate, h.REMARK as remark, h.LAST_CHANGE_INFO as lastChangeInfo FROM E_M_EQUIP_ALLOCATE_HISTORY h INNER JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON h.EQUIP_ID = e.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE ebc ON e.EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = ebc.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE emc ON e.EQUIP_MIDDLE_CATEGORY_ID = emc.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE esc ON e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID = esc.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT d ON e.USE_COMPANY_ID = d.ID LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT u ON e.USE_ORG_ID = u.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_FINANCE efi ON e.ID = efi.EQUIP_ID AND efi.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY esi ON e.ID = esi.EQUIP_ID AND esi.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE h.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND h.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY h.CREATE_TIME DESC
